subcodes.first_line: O ye two tested believers! Your letter was received, and verily the friends of Artois and the friends of Cologne and the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مومن ممتحن نامه وصول یافت و فی الحقیقه احبای آرتوز و احبای کول و احبای
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
